ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "years" TEXT /* Years applicable for the transaction */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "license_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the license part of the transaction */,
  "photo_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the photo part of the transaction */,
  "county_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the county part of the transaction */,
  "total_fee" TEXT /* Total fee for the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was processed */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver associated with the transaction */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle associated with the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the transaction was processed */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the DMV employee who processed the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the transaction type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction type */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the fee structure is applicable */,
  "license_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the license part of the transaction */,
  "photo_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the photo part of the transaction */,
  "county_fee" TEXT /* Fee for the county part of the transaction */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee structure became effective */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the fee structure is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_fees_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Driver's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Driver's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Driver's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Driver's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Driver's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Driver's email */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the driver record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the driver record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who owns the vehicle */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Vehicle registration number */,
  "registration_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the vehicle registration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Employee's position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Employee's department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)
